question.text:
Dear Kieran,
Good day,

 

Unfortunately, I am unable to amend the customer code in the BL details.

 

When i select another customer code, it does not appear after I click on select .

 

Please advise on how we can proceed.

 

CULVAQJ2500076

CULVAQJ2500078

 



 

 

Regards,

 

Marah Al Fawaier/Ms
Senior Customer Service Executive

Sharaf Shipping Agencies Co. W.L.L

THE BOULIVARD, ABDALI

Tel: +962 6 5695960 / 5695970 
WhatsApp :+962797229071

Fax: +962 6 5682813
E-mail: csv@ssajordan.com <mail

www.sharafshipping.com <http://www.sharafshipping.com/> 

 


To: CSV - SSA JOR <csv@ssajordan.com>; Amber Hu/CUL-CN/FIN <amber

answer.text:
Dear Marah,

For the MIV invoice, you just need to update the Actual Customer in MIV.

If the Shipper Customer in the booking needs to be changed, a C/N is required since DPY = Y, but it won’t affect the invoice.





Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


Date: Tuesday, January 13, 2026 at 15:13
To: Kieran Ji/CUL-CN/IT <kieranji@culines.com>, Amber Hu/CUL-CN/FIN <amberhu@culines.com>, Louis Xia/CUL-CN/CS <louisxia@culines.com>, DANIEL CHEN/CUL-West Asia <danielchen@culines.com>, Joanne Ding/CUL-CN/IT <joanneding@culines.com
